item.title: Unreal Engine 5 Mega Lights and Path Tracer Updates
item.description: Epic discusses Unreal Engine 5 rendering updates, Mega Lights, hardware ray tracing, Lumen, Nanite, and virtual shadow maps.
item.author: Epic Games

item.title: NVIDIA RTX Neural Rendering and DLSS Ray Reconstruction
item.description: NVIDIA describes RTX rendering, DLSS ray reconstruction, opacity micromaps, mesh shader workflows, and neural radiance cache.
